patterns_discovered.description: Dependencies remain in alphabetical order (anyhow, blake3, chrono, dirs, serde...)
Most dependencies use .workspace = true (anyhow, chrono, dirs, serde), but blake3 uses direct version constraint ("1")
Single-line addition with no other modifications to file structure or existing dependencies

gotchas_discovered.description: blake3 is specified as direct dependency ("1") while surrounding deps use workspace references; unclear if intentional or if blake3 should be added to workspace root first
Version constraint "1" is broad (accepts 1.0.0 through <2.0.0); verify if specific version pinning is needed for security/compatibility

approach_outcome.summary: blake3 dependency successfully added to bop-core/Cargo.toml with proper alphabetical ordering

recommendations.recommendation: Verify blake3 should not be added to workspace [dependencies] root (Cargo.toml) for consistency with other crates using .workspace = true
Confirm blake3 is actually used in bop-core code (grep for import/usage); dependency-only declarations suggest incomplete implementation
Consider pinning to specific blake3 version (e.g., "1.5.0") if supply chain security is a concern; "1" is acceptable for permissive deps
